name: Tacmina Corporation
summary: Tacmina Corporation manufactures and sells precision pumps in Japan and internationally. It offers smoothflow pumps, motor-driven metering pumps, solenoid-driven metering pumps, metering pump accessories, chemical injection systems, and agitators. The company also provides water quality measurement/control equipment, mixing equipment/static mixers, weak-acidic sodium hypochlorite solution generators, fluid control units, and smoothflow units and systems; and processing metering pumps, precision coating pumps, general-purpose metering pumps, chemical tanks, and chemical transfer pumps, as well as maintenance/customer support services. It serves battery and electronic, chemical and biochemical, machine and automobile, pulp and paper, iron and metal, ceramic, plastic and rubber, food and drink, pharmaceutical and cosmetic, water treatment, coating, ink, sterilization, and film industries. The company was formerly known as Nihon Feeder Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tacmina Corporation in 1993. Tacmina Corporation was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
